A cada hora indicada el contador vuelve: At each set time the counter goes back to 1. E.g. 6 and 18 for morning and afternoon shifts.
Abre con app desktop en lugar de web: Opens with desktop app instead of web
Abre la pantalla cliente en una pestaña: Opens the customer screen in a new tab to install it as an app on the second monitor
Abrir cajon de dinero con pagos en efect: Open cash drawer with cash payments
Abrí el menú del navegador (⋮) y elegí \: Open the browser menu (⋮) and choose "Install" or "Create shortcut". Then open it from the icon on the second monitor.
Abrí esta dirección en tu navegador Chro: Open this address in your Chrome or Edge browser (not inside the system app) and use the menu ⋮ → "Install". Then open it from its icon on the second monitor.
Abrí la app de pago y escaneá el código: Open your payment app and scan the code
Abrí la app Pantalla Cliente en el monit: Open the Customer Screen app on the customer monitor to connect it
Acepte los términos y confirme la creaci: Accept the terms and confirm the creation of the application
Activa la pantalla pública de consulta d: Enables the public price-checker screen. When off, the screen shows no data.
Activa la pantalla pública de pedidos y: Enables the public orders screen and real-time broadcasting. When off, no events are emitted.
Active esta opción para vincular este cl: Enable this option to link this customer with an existing supplier or create a new one.
Actualiza el perfil de percepción de IIB: Updates your customers' Gross Income (IIBB) perception profile from the official ARBA or AGIP registry.
Actualiza la información de tu perfil y: Update your profile information and email address.
Actualiza los precios de múltiples artíc: Quickly update prices for multiple items
Administra descuentos, ofertas y promoci: Manage discounts, offers and special promotions
Administra las formas de pago y planes d: Manage payment methods and installment plans
Administra las impresoras y sus asignaci: Manage printers and their assignments by branch/register
Administra las recetas de tus artículos: Manage the recipes of your articles
Administra los grupos de etiquetas y sus: Manage tag groups and their values to classify items
Administra los grupos de opciones para t: Manage option groups for your products
Administra los productos y servicios de: Manage your business products and services
Administra los roles y sus permisos de a: Manage roles and their menu access permissions
Administra los usuarios y sus roles en e: Manage users and their roles in the system
Administre cuentas bancarias y billetera: Manage bank accounts and digital wallets
Agrega al menos un artículo al combo: Add at least one item to the combo
Agrega al menos un artículo bonificable: Add at least one reward item
Agrega al menos un artículo que active l: Add at least one item that triggers the promotion
Agrega al menos un grupo al menú: Add at least one group to the menu
Agrega escalas para ofrecer diferentes p: Add tiers to offer different promotions based on quantity
Agregar un nuevo pago incrementa el tota: Adding a new payment increases the sale total. If the payment method is fiscal, a new invoice may be required.
Agregue un concepto por importe sin espe: Add a concept by amount without specifying an item (e.g.: deli sale for $5,000)
Agregá la jurisdicción del cliente desde: Add the customer jurisdiction from the search box and then set its rate (or mark it as exempt).
Agregá opciones usando el campo de arrib: Add options using the field above
Ajuste inicial: saldo real del proveedor: Initial adjustment: actual provider balance at :fecha
Ajustes y cuotas se configuran en el des: Adjustments and installments are configured in the breakdown
Al cancelar el pedido se anulan todos su: Cancelling the order voids all active payments (with cash counter-entry) and reverses the deducted stock. This action cannot be undone.
Al continuar verás una previsualización: You will see a preview before applying the changes
Al convertir se crea la venta, se migran: On conversion the sale is created, payments are migrated, stock and cash movements are reassigned. The order ends as "Invoiced".
Al grabar se generará un snapshot de pre: Saving will generate a price snapshot for all branch articles. Articles created afterwards will be excluded from this list.
Al vincular, la terminal se pone en modo: When linking, the terminal is set to integrated mode (POS) and charges are sent to it from the system.
Al vincular, los cobros con esta forma d: When linked, collections with this payment method will be automatically recorded in the account
Análisis de ventas por período y sucursa: Sales analysis by period and branch
ARBA actualiza la percepción de IIBB de: ARBA updates the Buenos Aires IIBB perception; AGIP, the CABA one.
ARBA — Buenos Aires (Régimen general por: ARBA — Buenos Aires (General regime by subject)
Arqueo aprobado y ajuste aplicado: Cash count approved and adjustment applied
Arrastra las formas de pago para definir: Drag payment methods to define the order they will appear throughout the system.
Arrastrá el marcador para ajustar el pun: Drag the marker to adjust the point
Arrastrá una imagen o hacé clic. JPG, PN: Drag an image or click. JPG, PNG or WebP (max. 4 MB).
Artículos específicos con precio fijo o: Specific items with fixed price or percentage discount.
Artículos que activan la promo diferente: Items that trigger the promo different from the rewarded ones.
Asegurate de tener QZ Tray instalado y e: Make sure you have QZ Tray installed and running.
Asegúrate de usar una contraseña larga y: Make sure to use a long and secure password to protect your account.
Asigna automáticamente a las más antigua: Automatically assigns to the oldest ones
Asigna etiquetas para clasificar este ar: Assign tags to classify this item
Asigna grupos de opcionales a tus artícu: Assign optional groups to your articles. When assigning, they are created for all branches.
Asigna los puntos de venta AFIP para fac: Assign AFIP point of sale for electronic invoicing
Asistente paso a paso para configurar un: Step-by-step wizard to configure a new price
Atención: el contribuyente figura como I: Warning: the taxpayer is listed as INACTIVE in ARCA.
Avisa si falta stock pero permite vender: Warns if stock is low but allows sale. Stock is deducted regardless.
Busca y agrega artículos para comenzar: Search and add items to start
Search article by code or name...
Search by ID, code or name...
Buscar por nombre o código (ej: IIBB, pe: Search by name or code (e.g. IIBB, perception)
Search by name, code or description...
Buscar por nombre, CUIT, email, teléfono: Search by name, CUIT, email, phone...
Buscar por nombre, código o código de ba: Search by name, code or barcode (min. 3 characters)...
Search by name, description or coupon...
Search by name, email or ID...
Buscar por número de comprobante o prove: Search by receipt number or supplier...
Buscá la jurisdicción del cliente arriba: Search the customer jurisdiction above (e.g. Gross Income Buenos Aires) and add it; then you will be able to set the rate or mark it as exempt.
Buscá un artículo para ver su precio: Search for an item to see its price
Cada día se prepara una conciliación del: Each day a reconciliation of the previous day against the payment provider is prepared. It always awaits your review: it is never applied on its own.
Caja cambiada. El carrito ha sido limpia: Register changed. The cart has been cleared.
Caja pausada - El turno del grupo sigue: Register paused - Group shift still active
Caja pausada con movimientos pendientes: Register paused with pending closing transactions
Cambio programado no encontrado o ya pro: Scheduled change not found or already processed
Cambios de pago aplicados sobre ventas d: Payment changes applied to sales from closed shifts
Cantidad vacía = aplica a todas las unid: Empty quantity = applies to all units
Cargá domicilios para este CUIT (botón \: Load addresses for this CUIT ("Addresses" button) and then assign them.
Cargá pagos planificados o cobrados ante: Load planned or charged payments before converting, or add a payment with form "current account".
Cierre de turno rechazado y revertido co: Shift closing rejected and reverted successfully
Cocina recibirá el ticket completo (reim: Kitchen will receive the full ticket (reprint)
Cocina recibirá solo lo agregado, con et: Kitchen will receive only the added items, with the ADDED label
Columnas requeridas: Nombre (obligatorio: Required columns: Name (required) and Prefix (optional, max. 10 characters)
Columnas: ID (no modificar), Nombre (obl: Columns: ID (do not modify), Name (required) and Prefix (optional, max. 10 characters)
Columnas: Nombre, Razón Social, CUIT, Em: Columns: Name, Business Name, CUIT, Email, Phone, Address, Tax Status, Current Account, Credit Limit, Status
Comienza agregando un CUIT para poder em: Start by adding a CUIT to be able to issue electronic invoices.
Comienza creando tu primera compra: Start by creating your first purchase
Comienza creando tu primera venta: Start by creating your first sale
Complete los datos básicos para crear un: Complete the basic information to quickly create a new customer.
Con datos: se actualiza el artículo exis: With ID: updates the existing article (allows renaming)
con esta lista el precio sera: with this list the price will be
Con ID: se actualiza el artículo existen: With ID: updates the existing article (allows renaming)
Con ID: se actualiza la categoría (permi: With ID: the category is updated (allows renaming it)
con la cuenta de Mercado Pago de la sucu: with the branch's Mercado Pago account
con todos sus datos: precio, sucursales,: with all its data: price, branches, recipes, options, tags and list prices. Stock starts at 0.
Conciliación aplicada: los ajustes se re: Reconciliation applied: the adjustments were recorded in the account
Conciliación iniciada: se está pidiendo: Reconciliation started: requesting the report from the provider
Concilie el saldo de sus cuentas contra: Reconcile your account balances against the actual movements of the payment provider
Conectá esta forma de pago a una pasarel: Connect this payment method to a gateway (e.g. Mercado Pago). Each product is an integration with its own charging mode.
Configura disponibilidad, modo de stock: Configure availability, stock mode and saleability per branch
Configura donde y que documentos imprimi: Configure where and what documents it will print
Configura el logo y datos adicionales de: Configure the logo and additional data for each branch
Configura formas de pago y planes de cuo: Configure payment methods and installment plans
Configura los parámetros de cada caja, a: Configure the parameters of each register, assign AFIP POS and define shared closing groups
Configura primero los CUITs y sus puntos: First configure the CUITs and their points of sale
Configura qué formas de pago están dispo: Configure which payment methods are available at each branch and their adjustments
Configura y aplica ajustes de precios a: Configure and apply price adjustments to multiple items
Configure cuentas bancarias o billeteras: Set up bank accounts or wallets from
Configure la lista de precios para cada: Configure the price list for each branch where the customer is active.
Configure las credenciales de cada prove: Configure the credentials of each provider for this branch. Credentials are stored encrypted.
Configure los filtros y haga clic en \"G: Configure the filters and click "Generate Report" to see the data.
Configurá la imagen del QR de Mercado Pa: Set up the Mercado Pago QR image in the payment method before charging with an open-amount QR.
Configurá las credenciales de Point para: Configure the Point credentials to see more device details.
Confirmá solo si verificaste que el clie: Confirm only if you verified the customer paid. The system did not detect the payment automatically and this action is logged.
Confirm only if you verified the customer paid. This action is logged.
Consulta y detalle de cierres de turno a: View and detail previous shift closings
Contacta al administrador para obtener a: Contact the administrator to get access
Control de inventario y alertas por sucu: Inventory control and alerts by branch
Copie el Access Token y la Public Key de: Copy the test Access Token and Public Key
Copie el Access Token y la Public Key y: Copy the Access Token and Public Key and paste them into the corresponding fields
Copy the Access Token and Public Key and paste them into the corresponding fields of this form
Copie esa clave y péguela en el campo \": Copy that key and paste it into the "Webhook Secret" field of this form
Crea tu primer grupo de etiquetas para e: Create your first tag group to start classifying items.
Crear una aplicación en Mercado Pago: Create an application in Mercado Pago
Cuando es descuento %, siempre se bonifi: When it is % discount, always 1 unit is rewarded
Cuenta vinculada automáticamente desde l: Account auto-linked from the payment integration
You must enter an authorization key.
Debe seleccionar al menos un modo permit: You must select at least one allowed mode
Debe seleccionar los conceptos permitido: You must select the allowed concepts
Debe seleccionar un cliente para ventas: You must select a customer for current account sales
Debe seleccionar un concepto de pago: You must select a payment concept
Debe seleccionar un modo de cobro: You must select a charge mode
Debe seleccionar un modo default: You must select a default mode
Debe seleccionar una caja o tener una ca: You must select a register or have an active register
Debe seleccionar una impresora del siste: You must select a system printer
Debe seleccionar una sucursal para expor: You must select a branch to export
Debe seleccionar una sucursal para impor: You must select a branch to import
Debes ingresar la cantidad de cuotas: You must enter the number of installments
Debes ingresar un nombre para la promoci: You must enter a name for the promotion
Debes seleccionar al menos una sucursal: You must select at least one branch
Debes seleccionar un artículo para la pr: You must select an item for the Fixed Price promotion
Debes seleccionar un tipo de promoción: You must select a promotion type
Default para nuevas sucursales. Se puede: Default for new branches. Can be changed per branch.
Define when this list should apply. All conditions must be met (AND).
Define dónde aplicará este precio: Define where this price will apply
define el orden de aplicación entre prom: defines the application order among combinable promotions. Each one is calculated on the result of the previous one.
Define el período en el que este precio: Define the period in which this price will be valid. If you leave both dates empty, the price will be permanent.
Define la jurisdicción del cliente para: Sets the customer jurisdiction for Gross Income perceptions.
Define los parámetros de operación para: Define the operation parameters for this branch
Define límites de efectivo y modo de car: Define cash limits and initial shift load mode
Define qué medio aparece preseleccionado: Defines which method is preselected on the terminal. "Open" lets the customer choose.
Deja las opciones en blanco para que el: Leave options blank for the price to apply generically.
Dejar vacío para usar el precio genérico: Leave empty to use the generic price
Dentro de la aplicación creada en Mercad: Inside the application created in Mercado Pago, go to the "Notifications" section and select "Webhooks"
Dentro de la aplicación recién creada, e: Inside the newly created application, in the side menu choose "Production credentials"
Dentro de la aplicación, vaya a \"Webhoo: Inside the application, go to "Webhooks" → "Configure notifications"
Deposito cancelado - Monto devuelto a te: Deposit cancelled - Amount returned to treasury
Describe the reason for the adjustment...
Describe the purpose of this list...
Después de vincular, reiniciá el disposi: After linking, restart the device with an internet connection so the mode change takes effect.
Domicilios declarados ante AFIP. Cada pu: Addresses declared to AFIP. Each point of sale is linked to one; the Gross Income jurisdiction comes from the address's province.
Efectivo Total Contado (Arqueo del Fondo: Total Cash Counted (Common Fund Cash Count)
Ej: ARCA rechaza por CUIT inválido, a re: E.g.: ARCA rejects due to invalid CUIT, to resolve manually
Ej: Cajero tildó débito por error, era t: Ex: Cashier marked debit by mistake, was transfer
Ej: cliente no se presentó, error de car: E.g.: customer didn't show up, data entry error, etc.
Ej: Documento no valido como factura: E.g.: Document not valid as invoice
Ej: Faltaba agregar el efectivo que el c: Ex: Missing to add the cash customer left
Ej: Gracias por su compra!: E.g.: Thank you for your purchase!
Ej: Se cargó un pago duplicado por error: Ex: A duplicate payment was mistakenly added
Ej: si 1 dólar vale 1.400 pesos, selecci: E.g.: if 1 dollar is worth 1,400 pesos, select USD as the quoted currency and ARS as the expression currency
El Access Token de producción es obligat: The production Access Token is required when mode is production
El Access Token de test es obligatorio c: The test Access Token is required when mode is test
El ajuste no puede ser menor a -100%: The adjustment cannot be less than -100%
El archivo debe ser Excel (.xlsx) o CSV: The file must be Excel (.xlsx) or CSV
The file must be an image.
El archivo está vacío o no tiene filas d: The file is empty or has no data rows
The file was not uploaded correctly.
El archivo supera el tamaño máximo permi: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size (100 MB).
El artículo no está disponible en esta s: The item is not available at this branch
El artículo no tiene stock en esta sucur: The item has no stock in this branch
El cliente escanea el QR e ingresa el mo: The customer scans the QR and enters the amount in their app
El cliente lo escanea, ingresa el monto: The customer scans it, enters the amount and you confirm the payment.
El cliente se creará como Consumidor Fin: The customer will be created as Final Consumer. You can complete the other data later from customer management.
El cliente será movido a la papelera y p: The client will be moved to trash and can be restored later.
El cobro se registró, pero la facturació: The payment was recorded, but invoicing is pending. Retry it from Registers → Pending Invoicing Payments.
El color de acento debe ser un código he: The accent color must be a valid hexadecimal code.
El color de fondo debe ser un código hex: The background color must be a valid hexadecimal code.
El color de texto debe ser \"auto\" o un: The text color must be "auto" or a valid hexadecimal.
El color debe ser un código hexadecimal: The color must be a valid hexadecimal code.
El combo debe tener al menos 2 unidades: The combo must have at least 2 units in total
El concepto seleccionado no es válido: The selected concept is not valid
El consultor de precios está desactivado: The price checker is disabled for this branch.
El CUIT ingresado no es válido: The entered CUIT is not valid
El CUIT ingresado no es válido. Verifiqu: The entered CUIT is not valid. Please check the number.
El CUIT tiene certificado y clave privad: The CUIT has certificate and private key loaded
El descuento supera el máximo permitido: Discount exceeds the maximum allowed for your role
El grupo y sus opciones serán marcados c: The group and its options will be marked as deleted. You can restore them from the "Deleted" filter.
El IVA lo determina la condición de IVA: VAT is determined by the CUIT's VAT condition. Here you configure perceptions, withholdings and other taxes.
The limit must be a number.
El mapa se carga solo al abrirlo: The map loads only when you open it
El modo default debe estar entre los mod: The default mode must be among the allowed modes
El monto convertido excede el pendiente: The converted amount exceeds the pending
El monto debe ser mayor a 0: The amount must be greater than 0
El monto debe ser mayor a cero: The amount must be greater than zero
El monto es insuficiente para cubrir la: The amount is insufficient to cover the sale
El monto excede el pendiente: The amount exceeds the pending balance
The fixed amount must be a number.
The fixed amount cannot be negative.
El monto ingresado se acreditará como sa: The entered amount will be credited as a customer credit balance for use in future collections.
El motivo debe tener al menos 10 caracte: Reason must be at least 10 characters
El motivo debe tener al menos 5 caracter: Reason must be at least 5 characters
El nombre debe tener al menos 3 caracter: The name must have at least 3 characters
The CUIT number is not valid.
El número de punto de venta es obligator: The point of sale number is required.
El número de serie (SC) está en la etiqu: The serial number (SC) is on the barcode label on the back of the Point device, at the top.
The number must be at least 1.
The number must be an integer.
El operador ingresa manualmente el monto: The operator manually enters the initial amount when opening the shift
El padrón debe subirse comprimido (.zip: The registry must be uploaded compressed (.zip or .gz).
El pago no se detectó automáticamente: The payment was not detected automatically
El pago quedará marcado como error y no: The payment will be marked as error and cannot be retried automatically. Enter the reason.
El pedido en estado ':estado' no acepta: Order in status ':estado' does not accept payments
El porcentaje de descuento debe estar en: The discount percentage must be between 1 and 100
El porcentaje no puede ser mayor a 100%: The percentage cannot be greater than 100%
El precio debe ser mayor o igual a 0: The price must be greater than or equal to 0
El precio debe ser un número: The price must be a number
El precio opera sobre la sucursal activa: The price operates on the active branch. If it matches the base, no change is recorded.
El proveedor descontó :impuesto pero el: The provider withheld :impuesto but the CUIT is not configured for it: check whether it applies
El proveedor genera el reporte de movimi: The provider generates the movements report asynchronously. This screen refreshes automatically.
El proveedor incluye los movimientos con: The provider includes movements with a few hours of delay: they will normally reconcile on their own in a future reconciliation, without you having to do anything.
El proveedor no generó el reporte dentro: The provider did not generate the report within the expected time
El proveedor no soporta reportes de cuen: The provider does not support account reports
El proveedor solo genera reportes de has: The provider only generates reports of up to :dias days
El punto de venta marcado como \"Defecto: The point of sale marked as "Default" will be used automatically when invoicing
El saldo inicial no puede ser negativo: The initial balance cannot be negative
El sistema elige la combinación de promo: The system picks the combination of promotions that MOST saves the customer. If this promotion isn't better than others applicable, it won't apply.
El token es compartido con el llamador d: The token is shared with this branch's caller display.
El uso del llamador de pedidos está desa: The order caller display is disabled for this branch.
El valor debe ser un número: The value must be a number
El webhook permite confirmar los pagos a: The webhook confirms payments instantly, even if the cashier closes the browser. Without a webhook, the system detects the payment by periodic polling (slower). Each Mercado Pago application (QR, Point) has its own webhook and its own secret key: repeat these steps in each one.
Elegí provincia y localidad para ubicar: Choose province and locality to locate the address
Elegí provincia y localidad, y ubicá la: Choose province and city, and locate the branch on the map. Mercado Pago uses this data to register the branch (store).
Elegí qué hacer con la fiscalidad: Choose what to do with tax status
Elegí qué tipo de plantilla querés desca: Choose which type of template you want to download:
Elija una cuenta del selector para ver s: Select an account from the dropdown to view its movements
En \"Eventos\", seleccione únicamente <s: In "Events", select only "Order (Mercado Pago)" (do not check other events)
En \"URL de producción\" ingrese la sigu: In "Production URL" enter the following address:
En el menú lateral elija \"Credenciales: In the side menu choose "Production credentials"
En el mismo panel, elija \"Credenciales: In the same panel, choose "Test credentials"
En el panel de Mercado Pago, vaya a \"Tu: In the Mercado Pago panel, go to "Your business" → "Account data"
En el panel, vaya a \"Webhooks\" → \"Con: In the panel, go to "Webhooks" → "Configure notifications"
En la app de Mercado Pago entrá a Cobrar: In the Mercado Pago app go to Charge with QR → your store or register settings and choose “open amount” (the customer enters the amount). Then download that QR and upload it here.
En modo automático, el sistema optimiza: In automatic mode, the system optimizes for customer savings
Es indispensable para que el sistema sep: It is essential for the system to know which branch each received payment belongs to
Es posible que Mercado Pago le pida acti: Mercado Pago may ask you to activate production mode (verify identity, accept conditions, etc.)
Es su primera conciliación: ingrese el s: This is your first reconciliation: enter the current total balance of the provider account (available + pending release + reserve). An initial adjustment will be recorded for the difference and the system balance will match the actual one.
Escaneá con una tablet/celular para vinc: Scan with a tablet/phone to pair.
Escaneá el código con la app para pagar: Scan the code with the app to pay
Escaneá el QR de Configuración o ingresá: Scan the QR from Settings or enter the branch pairing code.
Escribe al menos 2 caracteres para busca: Type at least 2 characters to search
Escribe al menos 3 caracteres para busca: Type at least 3 characters to search...
Type the item name or code...
Type to search by name or code...
Esperando pago en la terminal: Waiting for payment on the terminal
Esperá a que el cliente pague el monto e: Wait for the customer to pay the amount in their Mercado Pago app.
Esta accion no eliminara permanentemente: This action will not permanently delete the data, but the item will no longer be available in the system.
This action will not permanently delete the data, but the category will no longer be available in the system.
This action will not permanently delete the data, but the list will no longer be available in the system.
Esta accion rechazara la rendicion y rev: This action will reject the settlement and completely revert the associated shift closing. The registers will be reopened and balances restored to the state before closing.
Esta accion se puede revertir. La promoc: This action can be reverted. The promotion will be marked as deleted but will remain in the system for statistics purposes.
Esta acción se puede revertir. La promoc: This action can be reverted. The promotion will be marked as deleted but will remain in the system for statistics purposes.
Esta acción también actualizará los prec: This action will also update fixed prices in price lists where these items participate.
Esta acción también eliminará todas las: This action will also delete all tags in the group.
Esta caja nunca ha sido abierta. Inicie: This register has never been opened. Start a shift to begin operating.
Esta cuenta de Mercado Pago (user_id :us: This Mercado Pago account (user_id :user) is already in use by another business for :modo mode. Use a different Mercado Pago account.
Esta cuenta no tiene un CUIT asignado, a: This account has no CUIT assigned, so the taxes withheld by the provider will not be recorded in the tax ledger. Assign a CUIT to the account in the company accounts settings to keep the tax position.
This is a secure area of the application. Please confirm your password before continuing.
Esta forma de pago no permite cuotas: This payment method does not allow installments
Esta seguro de eliminar esta impresora?: Are you sure you want to delete this printer?
Esta seguro? Esta accion revertira el ci: Are you sure? This action will revert the complete shift closing and reopen the registers.
Esta será la única promoción aplicable: This will be the only applicable promotion
Esta venta pertenece a un turno cerrado: This sale belongs to a closed shift
Estas a punto de eliminar la promocion:: You are about to delete the promotion:
Este arqueo esta pendiente de aprobacion: This cash count is pending approval.
Este artículo no es canjeable con puntos: This item cannot be redeemed with points
Este artículo no tiene grupos opcionales: This article has no optional groups assigned
This article has no optional groups assigned in this branch
Este artículo ya está en el combo: This item is already in the combo
Este artículo ya está en el grupo: This item is already in the group
Este artículo ya está en la lista: This item is already in the list
Este cliente no tiene percepciones confi: This customer has no perceptions configured. Add one from the search box.
Este CUIT no tiene impuestos configurado: This CUIT has no taxes configured. Add one from the search box.
Este CUIT no tiene puntos de venta. Agre: This CUIT has no points of sale. Add one above.
Este cupón pertenece a otro cliente: This coupon belongs to another customer
Este grupo no tiene opciones definidas: This group has no options defined
Este grupo utiliza fondo comun. El monto: This group uses a common fund. The entered amount will be shared among the
Este item aún no se envió a cocina: This item has not been sent to kitchen yet
Este monto se usará automáticamente al a: This amount will be used automatically when opening each shift
Este monto sera el fondo compartido por: This amount will be the shared fund for all registers in the group
Este número de punto de venta ya existe: This point of sale number already exists for this CUIT.
Este pago tiene :monto aplicados en :cou: This payment has :monto applied in :count collections. Void the collections from client Collections before modifying this payment.
Este pago ya fue anulado: This payment has already been voided
Este pedido no acepta pagos: This order does not accept payments
Este pedido no se puede convertir en ven: This order cannot be converted to sale

Fila :fila: el artículo \":nombre\" está: Row :fila: article ":nombre" is deleted, not modified

Forma de pago deshabilitada para la sucu: Payment method disabled for the branch
Forma de pago habilitada para la sucursa: Payment method enabled for the branch
Formato de imagen no permitido. Aceptado: Image format not allowed. Accepted: JPG, PNG, WebP.
Genere una clave secreta y péguela en es: Generate a secret key and paste it in this field
Gestiona las recetas default de cada art: Manage the default recipes of each article and their ingredients
Gestiona listas de precios con ajustes p: Manage price lists with percentage adjustments and conditions
Gestiona los cobros de clientes con cuen: Manage collections from customers with current accounts
Gestiona los datos de tu empresa, CUITs: Manage your company data, CUITs and branches
Gestión y consulta de ventas realizadas: Management and consultation of completed sales
Grupo eliminado. Las cajas ahora cierran: Group deleted. Registers now close individually.
Grupos con opciones intercambiables a pr: Groups with interchangeable options at fixed price or with discount.
Guarde la configuración: Mercado Pago ge: Save the configuration: Mercado Pago will generate a secret key
Haga clic en \"Configurar notificaciones: Click "Configure notifications" and make sure you are on the "Production mode" tab
Has alcanzado el límite máximo de: You have reached the maximum limit of
Hay :count fondo(s) de repartidor abiert: There are :count open delivery-driver fund(s) with change from this register: :detalle. The register can still be closed; the cash will come in when each fund is settled.
Haz clic aquí para reenviar el correo de: Click here to resend the verification email.
Haz clic en un artículo para agregarlo a: Click on an item to add it to the list with the configured adjustment.
Importante: el QR debe estar configurado: Important: the QR must be set to “open amount”.
Imprimir el QR estático para dejarlo en: Print the static QR to leave it at the counter
Imprimir ticket automaticamente al compl: Automatically print ticket when sale is completed
Incluye todas las categorías del sistema: Includes all categories from the system. Useful for bulk editing or backup.
Incluye todos los artículos con el preci: Includes all articles with the price from the active branch. Useful for bulk editing or backup.
Ingresa al menos un monto (mínimo o máxi: Enter at least one amount (minimum or maximum)
Ingresa el monto con el que inicias el t: Enter the amount you start the shift with
Ingrese el CUIT del cliente para obtener: Enter the customer's CUIT to retrieve their tax data from ARCA.
Ingrese el efectivo contado para calcula: Enter the counted cash to calculate the difference
Ingrese el efectivo total contado para c: Enter the total counted cash to calculate the difference
Ingrese el monto en moneda extranjera: Enter the amount in foreign currency
Ingrese la cotización para esta moneda: Enter the exchange rate for this currency
Ingrese un valor mayor a cero: Enter a value greater than zero
Ingrese un valor positivo para aumentar: Enter a positive value to increase or negative to decrease
Inicie sesión con la cuenta de Mercado P: Log in with the branch's Mercado Pago account
Instalala como app para abrirla a pantal: Install it as an app to open it full screen on the second monitor, with its own icon.
Intenta ajustar los filtros o crea una n: Try adjusting the filters or create a new promotion
Try adjusting the filters or create a new promotion
IVA e IIBB por CUIT y período: VAT and Gross Income by CUIT and period
IVA percibido/retenido como agente (a de: VAT perceived/withheld as agent (to deposit — not part of the position)
The selected agency is not valid.
La caja destino debe ser diferente a la: The destination register must be different from the current one
La caja no está disponible en este momen: The register is not available at this time.
La caja no tiene un POS creado en Mercad: The register does not have a POS created in Mercado Pago
La caja no tiene un punto de venta (POS): The register does not have a point of sale (POS) synced in Mercado Pago. Sync it before charging with QR.
La caja no tiene un turno abierto. Abre: The register does not have an open shift. Open a shift to start operating.
La caja no tiene una terminal Point asig: The register has no Point terminal assigned. Link one in Payment Integrations.
La caja no tiene una terminal Point de M: The register has no Mercado Pago Point terminal assigned. Link it before charging with Point.
La caja tiene múltiples puntos de venta: The register has multiple points of sale configured. Select which one to issue the fiscal receipt:
La caja tiene turno abierto pero se encu: The register has an open shift but is inactive. Activate it to continue operating.
La cantidad a bonificar debe ser menor q: The reward quantity must be less than the take quantity
La cantidad de ajuste debe ser diferente: The adjustment quantity must be different from zero
La cantidad de cuotas es obligatoria: The number of installments is required
La cantidad debe ser mayor a 0: The quantity must be greater than 0
La clave debe tener al menos 4 caractere: The key must have at least 4 characters.
La columna :col es obligatoria en la pri: Column :col is required in the first row
La columna ID (en gris) es gestionada po: The ID column (in gray) is managed by the system. Do not modify it: it allows updating an article even if you change its name or code.
The ID column (in gray) is managed by the system. Do not modify it: it allows updating a category even if you change its name.
La conciliación no está pendiente de rev: The reconciliation is not pending review
La configuración aplica a todas las caja: The settings apply to all registers of this branch.
La cuenta destino debe ser diferente a l: Destination account must be different from source account
La cuenta no está vinculada a un proveed: The account is not linked to a payment provider (no external identifier)
La edición manual tiene prioridad: la im: Manual editing takes precedence: the registry import does not overwrite manually entered values.
La emisión de factura falló y quedó pend: Invoice issuance failed and is pending
La fecha programada debe ser futura: The scheduled date must be in the future
La forma de pago no es fiscal, no se pue: The payment method is not fiscal, cannot issue invoice
La forma de pago no tiene una integració: The payment method has no integration assigned
La funcionalidad de conciliación bancari: Bank reconciliation will be available soon. It will allow importing bank statements and automatically reconciling them with recorded movements.
La imagen del QR no es válida o está cor: The QR image is invalid or corrupted.
La integración de pago no está configura: The payment integration is not configured for this branch
La integración seleccionada no es válida: The selected integration is not valid
La moneda de destino debe ser diferente: Target currency must be different from source
La NC es obligatoria para esta operación: Credit Note is mandatory for this operation. You do not have permission to skip it.
La prioridad debe ser al menos 1: The priority must be at least 1
La prioridad debe ser un número entero: The priority must be an integer
La promoción aplica a cualquier artículo: The promotion applies to any item in the sale
La promoción de Precio Fijo debe aplicar: The Fixed Price promotion must apply to a specific item
La receta debe tener al menos un ingredi: The recipe must have at least one ingredient
La sucursal debe sincronizarse primero e: The branch must first be synced in Mercado Pago before creating registers
La sucursal no tiene coordenadas (latitu: The branch has no coordinates (latitude/longitude) configured. Mercado Pago requires coordinates to create the store.
La sucursal no tiene dirección configura: The branch has no address configured
La sucursal no tiene localidad configura: The branch has no city configured (Mercado Pago requires it)
La sucursal no tiene provincia configura: The branch has no province configured (Mercado Pago requires it)
La sucursal no tiene un Store creado en: The branch has no Store created in Mercado Pago
La tasa de compra debe ser mayor a 0: Buy rate must be greater than 0
La tasa de venta debe ser mayor a 0: Sell rate must be greater than 0
La transacción no tiene un identificador: The transaction has no Mercado Pago order identifier
Las alícuotas se cargan manualmente. La: Rates are entered manually. Automatic updates from the provincial registry will be available soon.
Las cajas en este grupo compartirán el c: Registers in this group will share the shift closing
Las cajas en un grupo comparten el cierr: Registers in a group share the shift closing and their transactions are consolidated
Las credenciales de Mercado Pago se gene: Mercado Pago credentials are generated per application (product). QR and Point use separate applications, each with its own credentials and its own webhook, even if they belong to the same Mercado Pago account.

Mercado Pago credentials are generated per product. This integration covers QR (dynamic and static). If in the future you wish to use Point or another method, you will need to create an additional application in Mercado Pago and configure it as a separate integration.
Las cuotas se configuran en las formas d: Installments are configured in individual payment methods
Las escalas se evaluan en orden. Configu: Tiers are evaluated in order. Configure from lower to higher quantities.
Las filas inválidas se reportarán sin de: Invalid rows will be reported without stopping the import
Las formas de pago mixtas no tienen ajus: Mixed payment methods do not have their own adjustment. The adjustment is applied per each payment method used in the breakdown.
Las formas de pago mixtas no tienen cuot: Mixed payment methods do not have their own installments. Installments are configured in individual payment methods.
Las listas base aplican siempre a todos: Base lists always apply to all items without validity, condition or specific item restrictions.
Las listas de precios se configuran por: Price lists are configured per branch after saving the customer.
Las promociones se calculan usando los p: Promotions are calculated using the prices from this list as base
Ledger fiscal por CUIT y período. Alta m: Tax ledger by CUIT and period. Manual entry and reversal by counter-entry.
Limitá la promoción a ciertas categorías: Limit the promotion to certain categories or items
Lleva N unidades y paga M. Aplica a un a: Take N units and pay M. Applies to a specific item or category.
Los ajustes se aplican por cada forma de: Adjustments are applied per each payment method used in the breakdown
Los artículos que tengan un precio espec: Items that have a special price in this list do not participate in promotions
Los cambios se guardan al presionar el b: Changes are saved when pressing the button
Los certificados se guardarán encriptado: Certificates will be stored securely encrypted when saving the CUIT.
Los clientes con CUIT duplicado serán om: Customers with duplicate CUIT will be skipped
Los clientes se darán de alta con la lis: Customers will be registered with the base price list of each selected branch.
Los pagos planificados se materializarán: Planned payments will materialize on conversion (a cash movement will be created for each).
Los precios propios no se verán afectado: Custom prices will not be affected in other branches
Los precios puestos manualmente (sin por: Manually set prices (without percentage) will remain unchanged.
Los precios se actualizarán en la fecha: Prices will be updated at the specified date and time
Los precios se calculan al grabar y qued: Prices are calculated on save and stay fixed even if the article base price changes
Los siguientes precios se solaparían con: The following prices would overlap with the price you are trying to create:
Marca como agotado o disponible cada opc: Mark each option as out of stock or available per branch
Menor numero = mayor prioridad (1 es max: Lower number = higher priority (1 is highest)
Mercado Pago no devolvió el código QR de: Mercado Pago did not return the QR code for the order
Mercado Pago respondió error HTTP: Mercado Pago responded with HTTP error
Modelo de integración: <strong>\"Platafo: Integration model: "Platform" (if using BCN Pymes as your collection platform). Only choose "In-house development" if you are a Mercado Pago developer.
Monedas Extranjeras en Rendiciones Pendi: Foreign Currencies in Pending Fund Returns
Monto máximo de efectivo permitido en ca: Maximum cash amount allowed in register. Leave empty for no limit.
Mostrando el QR en la pantalla del clien: Showing the QR on the customer screen
Mostrando receta default. Al guardar se: Showing default recipe. Saving will create an override for this branch.
Mínimo 10 caracteres. Se guarda en el hi: Minimum 10 characters. Saved in history and adjustments report.
Ningún artículo del carrito coincide con: No cart item matches this coupon
No aplica a esta forma de pago: Does not apply to this payment method
No aplica a esta forma de venta: Does not apply to this sales form
No aplica a este canal de venta: Does not apply to this sales channel
No aplica a estos artículos: Does not apply to these items
No hay Access Token cargado para el modo: There is no Access Token loaded for the current mode
No hay ajustes post-cierre registrados c: No post-closing adjustments registered with these filters

No hay cajas configuradas en esta sucurs: No registers configured in this branch
No hay certificados ARCA configurados pa: No ARCA certificates configured to perform the query
No hay compras con crédito fiscal en el: No purchases with tax credit in the period.
No hay comprobantes emitidos en el perío: No invoices issued in the period.
No hay cortesías registradas en el perío: No courtesies recorded for the selected period.
No hay cotización disponible para esta m: No exchange rate available for this currency
No hay cuentas destino con la misma mone: No destination accounts with the same currency
No hay datos para mostrar en el periodo: No data to show in the selected period
No hay escala aplicable para la cantidad: No applicable tier for the quantity
No hay formas de pago activas en el sist: No active payment methods in the system
No hay movimientos en el periodo selecci: No transactions in the selected period
No hay movimientos fiscales para los fil: There are no tax movements for the selected filters.
No hay ninguna integración de pago en pr: There is no payment integration in production associated with this account
No hay pagos pendientes con estos filtro: No pending payments with these filters
No hay planes de cuotas configurados par: No installment plans configured for this payment method
No hay receta default. Agregue ingredien: No default recipe. Add ingredients to create an override.
No hay tesorería activa en esta sucursal: No active treasury in this branch
No hay transiciones disponibles desde es: No state transitions available from this state
No hay ventas registradas para este clie: No sales recorded for this customer
No modificar. El sistema usa este ID par: Do not modify. The system uses this ID to identify the article on import (allows renaming without duplicating).
Do not modify. The system uses this ID to identify the category on import (allows renaming without duplicating).
No permite vender si no hay stock sufici: Does not allow sale if stock is insufficient.
No se agregaron artículos (ya estaban to: No items were added (all were already included)
No se encontraron artículos con los filt: No items found with the selected filters
No se encontraron cajas configuradas en: No configured registers found in the system.
No se encontraron cierres en el periodo: No closings found in the selected period.
No se encontraron clientes con cuenta co: No customers with current accounts found
No se encontraron terminales Point en la: No Point terminals found in the account
No se modifica la fiscalidad de la venta: Sale tax status will not change
No se pisan los perfiles cargados a mano: Manually entered profiles are not overwritten: the manual setting takes precedence over the registry.
No se pudo cargar el mapa: The map could not be loaded
No se pudo conectar con Mercado Pago: Could not connect to Mercado Pago
No se pudo identificar el dispositivo en: Could not identify the device in Mercado Pago (it may be offline or unlinked).
No se pudo iniciar el cobro:: The charge could not be started:
No se pudo leer el archivo subido. Probá: The uploaded file could not be read. Please try again.
No se puede anular ni modificar: esta ve: This sale cannot be cancelled or modified: it has an integration (QR) payment already confirmed. The refund must be issued from the payment provider.
No se puede anular: el cliente ya canjeó: Cannot cancel: customer already redeemed the earned points
No se puede cambiar el rol. Debe existir: Cannot change the role. There must be at least one Super Administrator in the business.
No se puede crear el precio porque hay c: Cannot create the price because there are conflicts with existing prices. Please review the warnings section.
No se puede eliminar el grupo porque tie: Cannot delete the group because it has an open shift.
Cannot delete the group because it has an open shift. Close the shift first.
No se puede eliminar una cuenta con movi: Cannot delete an account with movements. Deactivate it instead.
No se puede eliminar: el grupo está asig: Cannot delete: group is assigned to products
No se puede modificar el grupo porque ti: Cannot modify the group because it has an open shift. Close the shift first.
No se puede modificar: el cliente ya can: Cannot modify: the customer already redeemed points earned on this sale
No se puede modificar: este pago se cobr: Cannot modify: this payment was charged via integration (QR) and is already confirmed. The refund must be issued from the payment provider.
No se registrará ningún movimiento. Podr: No movement will be recorded. You can reconcile the same period again later.
No tenés permiso para cancelar pedidos: You don't have permission to cancel orders
No tenés permiso para cobrar pedidos: You don't have permission to charge orders
No tenés permiso para confirmar pagos ma: You do not have permission to confirm payments manually
No tenés permiso para convertir pedidos: You don't have permission to convert orders to sales
No tenés permiso para invitar el pedido: Not allowed to comp full order
No tenés permiso para marcar errores de: You don\u0027t have permission to mark billing errors
No tenés permiso para modificar pagos de: You do not have permission to modify payments from closed shifts
You do not have permission to modify payments from closed shifts. Request the permission from your administrator.
You do not have permission to modify sale payments
No tenés permiso para reintentar factura: You don\u0027t have permission to retry billing
No tiene permiso para administrar integr: You do not have permission to manage payment integrations
No tiene permiso para aplicar descuento: No permission to apply general discount
No tiene permiso para gestionar movimien: You do not have permission to manage tax movements
No tiene permiso para importar padrones: You do not have permission to import registries
No tiene permiso para ver la posición fi: You don't have permission to view the tax position
No tiene permiso para ver los libros de: You don't have permission to view the VAT books
No tienen ajuste (recargo/descuento) pro: They do not have their own adjustment (surcharge/discount)
You do not have access to this business.
No tienes cajas asignadas o todas estan: You have no assigned registers or all are closed.
No tienes permisos para operar esta caja: You do not have permission to operate this register.
Nombre comercial visible al público: Trade name visible to the public
Notifica cuando se toma el pedido: Notifies when the order is taken
Notifica que está listo o en camino: Notifies that it is ready or on the way
Numeración reiniciada. El próximo pedido: Numbering reset. The next order starts from 1.
NxM, Combos/Packs y Menus del dia: NxM, Combos/Packs and Menus of the day
Obligatorio al crear. Elegí un tipo de I: Required when creating. Choose a VAT type from the dropdown.
Obligatorio al crear. Elegí una categorí: Required when creating. Choose a category from the dropdown.
Opcional al crear: si queda vacío, se au: Optional when creating: if left empty, auto-generated using the category prefix.
Opcional. Prefijo para códigos automátic: Optional. Prefix for automatic codes (max. 10 characters, converted to UPPERCASE).
Override eliminado por cambio masivo glo: Override removed by global bulk change
Override eliminado. Se usará la receta d: Override deleted. The default recipe will be used.
Pagos anulados. La venta se pasó a cuent: Payments voided. The sale was moved to current account.
Pagos cuya emisión de factura falló y pu: Payments whose invoice issuance failed and can be retried
Para imprimir desde el navegador necesit: To print from the browser you need QZ Tray installed and the BCN Pymes certificate.
Para la percepción de IVA sólo aplica la: For VAT perception only the exemption applies (exclusion certificate)
Para registrar los impuestos que el prov: To record the taxes the provider withholds during reconciliation.
Para retenciones/percepciones sufridas f: For withholdings/perceptions incurred outside MercadoPago/purchases and adjustments. VAT debit/credit is generated automatically from invoices and purchases.
Para una TV: tipear esta dirección: For a TV: type this address
Parece que ya está instalada en este nav: It looks like it's already installed in this browser. Look for its icon to open it, or use the browser's ⋮ menu → Install.
Pedidos activos por sucursal — cambiar e: Active orders by branch — change status, charge, convert to sale or cancel
Pedile al cliente que escanee con su app: Ask the customer to scan with their app
Pedile al cliente que escanee el QR de l: Ask the customer to scan the till's QR code
Pedile al cliente que pague en el posnet: Ask the customer to pay on the terminal
Pedí a un usuario habilitado que confirm: Ask an authorized user to confirm the payment received.
Permite vender sin verificar disponibili: Allows selling without checking availability. Stock is deducted regardless.
Permite verificar que las notificaciones: Allows verification that notifications come from Mercado Pago
Por ahora las coordenadas se cargan manu: For now coordinates are entered manually. To get them: open Google Maps, search the address, right-click on the exact point and copy the coordinates that appear first (format: -34.123456, -58.654321).
Precio de la sucursal activa. Si coincid: Price for the active branch. If it matches the generic base price of the article, no override is recorded.
Precio predeterminado usado cuando no ha: Default price used when no specific price is configured
Primero debe guardar el CUIT: You must save the CUIT first
Promociones que podrían aplicarse en el: Promotions that could apply in the same context
Promoción no combinable. El sistema apli: Non-combinable promotion. The system will automatically apply the best option for the customer.
Prueba cómo se aplicarían las promocione: Test how promotions would be applied
Puede usar el archivo exportado como pla: You can use the exported file as a template
QR dinámico: se muestra en pantalla por: Dynamic QR: shown on screen per sale. Static QR: the fixed printed QR at the counter.
Dynamic QR: shown on screen per sale. Static QR: the fixed printed counter QR. Open-amount QR: the customer enters the amount and you confirm manually.
Quedará pendiente emisión de Factura nue: New Invoice issuance of :monto will remain pending
Realiza el primer arqueo de tesoreria: Perform the first treasury cash count
Receta override creada para esta sucursa: Recipe override created for this branch
Recetas genéricas definidas para artícul: Generic recipes defined for articles and optionals
Recomendado para validar la integración: Recommended to validate the integration before going to production
Recomendado: imagen cuadrada (1:1), pref: Recommended: square image (1:1), preferably PNG with transparent background, minimum 400×400 px.
Reiniciá el contador manualmente cuando: Reset the counter manually when a new shift or batch starts.
Se alertará cuando el stock baje de este: An alert will be triggered when stock falls below this value
Se alertará cuando el stock supere este: An alert will be triggered when stock exceeds this value
Se anulará el pago, se revertirán los mo: The payment will be voided, linked movements will be reversed and the sale total will decrease. If the payment was invoiced, a Credit Note will be issued.
Se aplica SIEMPRE que se cumplan sus con: It ALWAYS applies when its conditions are met, before evaluating others. Useful for clearing stock or specific campaigns where you want to ensure this promotion runs no matter what.
Se creará un contraasiento para revertir: A counter-entry will be created to reverse this movement. This action cannot be undone.
Se creará un nuevo proveedor con los dat: A new supplier will be created with this customer's data.
Se eliminará de TODAS las sucursales, in: It will be removed from ALL branches, including prices and custom configurations.
Se eliminará la receta personalizada de: The custom recipe for this branch will be deleted and the default recipe will be used.
Se eliminarán los precios propios de las: Custom prices will be removed from the branches
Se eliminarán también todas las opciones: All options in this group will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Se eliminarán todos los artículos del ca: All items in the cart will be removed.
Se eliminarán todos los ingredientes. Es: All ingredients will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
Se emitirá Factura nueva por :monto: New Invoice will be issued for :monto
Se emitirá FC nueva automática: New Invoice will be issued automatically
Se emitirá FC nueva automática por cambi: New Invoice will be issued automatically (non-fiscal → fiscal change)
Se emitirá NC automática por cambio fisc: Credit Note will be issued automatically (fiscal → non-fiscal change)
Se emitirá NC obligatoria: Mandatory Credit Note will be issued
Se emitirá Nota de Crédito por :monto: Credit Note will be issued for :monto
Se generará un contraasiento que anula e: A counter-entry will be created to void the movement. The operation is recorded immutably.
Se guardarán como precios propios en: Will be saved as custom prices in
Se ha enviado un nuevo enlace de verific: A new verification link has been sent to your email.
A new verification link has been sent to the email address you provided during registration.
Se ingresa en la pantalla luego de abrir: Entered on the screen after opening the address.
Se intentará emitir la factura nuevament: The invoice will be attempted to be issued again with ARCA. If it fails again, the payment will be marked as error.
Se leyeron :total filas del padrón (:pad: Read :total registry rows (:padron perception rows). :sinmatch registry CUITs are not customers of the business.
Se propone automáticamente si la categor: Automatically proposed if category has a prefix
Se registrará como movimiento post-cierr: It will be recorded as a post-closing movement. The historical closing is not modified; the reversals will go to the current shift.
Se registrarán los movimientos propuesto: The proposed movements will be recorded in the account balance
Se usa automáticamente el monto fijo def: The defined fixed amount is used automatically
Se usa automáticamente el saldo del últi: The balance from the last closing is used automatically
Se usa en el monto y los detalles destac: Used for the amount and highlighted details.
Se usará para generar códigos automático: Will be used to auto-generate product codes (e.g.: MAT0001)
Se vinculará al proveedor seleccionado p: Will be linked to the selected supplier for unified current accounts.
Selecciona al menos una sucursal para ve: Select at least one branch to see available registers
Selecciona fecha y hora para programar: Select date and time to schedule
Selecciona los artículos a los que quier: Select the articles you want to assign this optional group to
Selecciona los destinos donde asignar es: Select the destinations to assign this recipe
Selecciona los destinos donde copiar est: Select the destinations to copy this recipe to
Selecciona los puntos de venta a asignar: Select the points of sale to assign
Selecciona un artículo y asígnale múltip: Select an item and assign multiple tags to it
Selecciona una caja para comenzar a oper: Select a register to start operating.
Selecciona una etiqueta y asígnala a múl: Select a tag and assign it to multiple items
Selecciona una sucursal en el menú super: Select a branch in the top menu to configure its available items
Selecciona una sucursal en el selector d: Select a branch in the selector above to configure its available items
Selecciona una sucursal para configurar: Select a branch to configure payment methods
Selecciona una sucursal y configura qué: Select a branch and configure which items are available in it
Seleccionar una caja en la barra superio: Select a register in the top bar
Seleccione los conceptos que podrán usar: Select the concepts that can be used with this mixed payment method (minimum 2).
Seleccione una caja con turno abierto pa: Select a register with an open shift to perform manual transactions.
Seleccione una cuenta para ver sus movim: Select an account to view its movements
Seleccione una sucursal para ver los rep: Select a branch to view reports
Seleccioná un CUIT y un período para ver: Select a CUIT and a period to view the tax position.
Seleccioná un período y generá el report: Select a period and generate the report.
Si aprueba con ajuste, se: If you approve with adjustment, it will
Si defines un código, la promoción solo: If you define a code, the promotion only applies when the customer enters it
Si el QR está en “monto fijo / lo define: If the QR is set to “fixed amount / set by the cashier”, when scanned Mercado Pago will ask the customer to notify the cashier and they won’t be able to enter the amount.
Si este puesto tiene un segundo monitor: If this station has a second monitor facing the customer, the payment QR will be shown there instead of on your screen. Requires monitors in "Extend" mode and the Chrome or Edge browser.
Si está activado, esta promoción puede a: If enabled, this promotion can be applied together with other combinable promotions
Si está activado, las ventas con esta fo: If enabled, sales with this payment method will generate a fiscal invoice by default
Si está activado, puede aplicarse junto: If enabled, it can apply along with other combinable promotions
Si está activo, el grupo maneja un único: If active, the group manages a single shared fund when opening a shift.
If active, the group manages a single shared fund; if not, each register has its individual fund
Si está activo, emite factura fiscal aut: If active, it automatically issues a fiscal invoice according to the configuration of the selected payment methods, without asking the user.
Si está activo, se percibe a la alícuota: If enabled, the fixed rate is perceived from every Registered Taxpayer customer without their own tax profile. Otherwise, perception applies only to customers with a configured rate (manual or registry).
Si está vacío, se usará el nombre de la: If empty, the category name or "Miscellaneous" will be used
Si hay muchos pedidos, el tamaño se redu: If there are many orders, the size shrinks automatically so they all fit without scrolling.
Si la percepción calculada no alcanza es: If the calculated perception does not reach this amount, it is not applied
Si lo dejás vacío se registra como \"Con: If left empty it is saved as "Final consumer".
Si no agregas ningun articulo o categori: If you don't add any item or category, this list will apply the adjustment of
Si no se define, usa el color del grupo: If not defined, uses the group color
Si no selecciona ninguna, el cupón aplic: If none selected, the coupon applies to all payment methods
Si no selecciona ninguna, estará disponi: If none selected, it will be available in all branches
Si no seleccionas ninguna, tendrá acceso: If you don't select any, they will have access to all.
Si no seleccionas ningún filtro, se apli: If you don't select any filter, it will apply to all active items.
Si no, cada caja tiene su propio fondo i: If not, each register has its own individual initial fund.
Si se define, la promo solo aplica al in: If set, the promo only applies when entered
Si un articulo tiene precio base de: If an item has a base price of
Si una categoría con el mismo nombre ya: If a category with the same name already exists, its prefix will be updated
Sin condiciones - la lista aplicara siem: No conditions - the list will always apply
Sin horarios: por defecto reinicia a las: No times set: resets at 06:00 by default.
Sin ID: se crea un artículo nuevo (códig: Without ID: creates a new article (code is auto-generated if empty)
Sin ID: se crea, o se actualiza el prefi: Without ID: it is created, or the prefix is updated if the name already exists
Sin integraciones. Esta forma de pago se: No integrations. This payment method is charged manually.
No Gross Income movements in the period.
Sin operaciones con otros medios de pago: No operations with other payment methods
Sin puntos de venta. Complete el formula: No points of sale. Complete the form above to add one.
Solo las listas estáticas pueden reconge: Only static lists can be refrozen
Only headers and sample rows. Ideal to load new categories from scratch.
Solo los encabezados. Ideal para cargar: Just the headers. Ideal for loading new articles from scratch.
solo puede aplicarse a un artículo espec: can only be applied to a specific item.
Solo puedes modificar los datos basicos: You can only modify the basic data and the adjustment percentage.
Solo se actualizan los clientes con CUIT: Only customers with a CUIT on file that appear in the registry are updated; the rest are reported as “no match”.
Solo se puede marcar como error un pago: Only a pending invoice payment can be marked as error
Solo se pueden conciliar cuentas vincula: Only accounts linked to a payment integration in production can be reconciled
Solo se usa la alícuota de percepción de: Only the registry's perception rate is used (the withholding rate is ignored).
Sonido al pasar un pedido a \"Listo\": Sound when an order moves to "Ready"
Subdiarios de IVA ventas y compras por C: VAT sales and purchases subledgers by CUIT and period
Subí el archivo comprimido (.zip) tal cu: Upload the compressed file (.zip) exactly as you download it from the agency; there is no need to unzip it.
Subí tu QR de Mercado Pago en modo “mont: Upload your Mercado Pago QR in “open amount” mode
Sucursales donde estará disponible: Branches where it will be available
Suma cantidad en vez de nueva línea: Add quantity instead of new line
Terminal vinculada a la caja. Reiniciá e: Terminal linked to the register. Restart the Point (with internet) so it switches to integrated mode.
Tiempo que el precio queda en pantalla a: How long the price stays on screen before waiting for the next scan.
Todas las cajas ya pertenecen a otros gr: All registers already belong to other groups
Todas las cantidades deben ser mayores a: All quantities must be greater than 0
Todas las escalas deben tener cantidad d: All tiers must have quantity from and value
Todavía no se aplicó ningún cambio. Revi: No changes have been applied yet. Review the results and confirm to apply.
Todos los artículos participan en el cál: All items participate in promotion calculation
Token regenerado. Los dispositivos vincu: Token regenerated. Paired devices will need to pair again.
Transferencias, ingresos y egresos manua: Transfers, manual register deposits and withdrawals
Tu dirección de correo no está verificad: Your email address is not verified.
Ubicación de la sucursal (provincia, loc: Branch location (province, city and coordinates). Useful for reports, logistics and online store; independent of invoicing.
Ubique la sucursal en el mapa para obten: Locate the branch on the map to get the coordinates
Un grupo de cierre debe tener al menos 2: A closing group must have at least 2 registers
Un número corto y amigable para el monit: A short, friendly number for the display and ticket that resets. The permanent number remains as an internal reference.
Una alícuota 0,00 o una baja del padrón: A 0.00 rate or a removal from the registry leaves the customer exempt (not perceived).
Una forma de pago mixta debe permitir al: A mixed payment method must allow at least 2 concepts
Una forma de pago mixta permite combinar: A mixed payment method allows combining multiple payment concepts (cash + card + transfer, etc.)
Una vez eliminada tu cuenta, todos sus r: Once your account is deleted, all its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Before deleting it, download any data you wish to keep.
Once your account is deleted, all its resources and data will be permanently deleted. Enter your password to confirm you want to delete your account.
Usa el selector de caja en la barra supe: Use the register selector in the top bar
Usalo solo si la dirección se filtró. De: Use only if the address was leaked. It unpairs all devices.
usando los precios base actuales de los: using the current base prices of articles.
Usar multiplicador general de la forma d: Use general multiplier from the payment method
Usuarios y Roles y Permisos son obligato: Users and Roles and Permissions are mandatory
Valor positivo = recargo, valor negativo: Positive value = surcharge, negative value = discount
Positive value = surcharge, negative value = discount. E.g.: 5 = +5% surcharge, -10 = 10% discount
Vaya a \"Tus integraciones\" y cree una: Go to "Your integrations" and create a new one (or select an existing one)
Vaya a \"Tus integraciones\" y haga clic: Go to "Your integrations" and click "Create application"
Venta a crédito en cuenta corriente del: Credit sale on customer's current account
Vista general de cuentas bancarias y bil: Overview of bank accounts and digital wallets
Ya existe un cliente con el CUIT :cuit:: A customer already exists with CUIT :cuit: :nombre
Ya existe una etiqueta con este código e: A tag with this code already exists in the group.
Ya hay una conciliación en curso para es: There is already a reconciliation in progress for this account
{1} Hay :count cobro de las últimas 24 h: {1} There is :count payment from the last 24 hours that does not appear in the provider's report yet.|[2,*] There are :count payments from the last 24 hours that do not appear in the provider's report yet.
¡Gracias por registrarte! Antes de comen: Thank you for signing up! Before getting started, please verify your email by clicking the link we sent you. If you didn't receive the email, we'll gladly send you another one.
¡Listo! Ya está instalada. Abrila desde: Done! It's now installed. Open it from its icon on the second monitor.
¿Aprobar y aplicar el ajuste de: Approve and apply the adjustment of
¿Cancelar este deposito? El monto sera d: Cancel this deposit? The amount will be returned to treasury.
¿Confirmar la recepcion del deposito por: Confirm the reception of the deposit for
¿Cómo obtener el Webhook Secret?: How to get the Webhook Secret?
¿Dónde encuentro este número?: Where do I find this number?
¿Eliminar el domicilio :dom? Los puntos: Delete address :dom? The associated points of sale will be left without an address.
¿Estas seguro de eliminar el articulo: Are you sure you want to delete the item
¿Estas seguro de eliminar la categoria: Are you sure you want to delete the category
¿Estas seguro de eliminar la lista: Are you sure you want to delete the list
¿Está seguro de cancelar esta compra?: Are you sure you want to cancel this purchase?
¿Está seguro de eliminar esta configurac: Are you sure you want to delete this configuration?
¿Está seguro de eliminar los certificado: Are you sure you want to delete the certificates? You will need to upload them again.
¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar el pu: Are you sure you want to delete the point of sale
¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar esta: Are you sure you want to delete this account? This action cannot be undone.
¿Está seguro de que desea eliminar este: Are you sure you want to delete this CUIT? This action will also delete all associated points of sale and cannot be undone.
¿Está seguro que desea anular este recib: Are you sure you want to void this receipt?
Are you sure you want to void this receipt? Reverse entries will be created to revert the movements.
¿Está seguro que desea reimprimir el sig: Are you sure you want to reprint the following document?
¿Está seguro? Esta acción no se puede de: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
¿Estás seguro de eliminar: Are you sure you want to delete
¿Estás seguro de eliminar el cliente: Are you sure you want to delete the customer
¿Estás seguro de eliminar el grupo: Are you sure you want to delete the group
¿Estás seguro de eliminar este grupo? La: Are you sure you want to delete this group? Registers will switch to closing individually.
¿Estás seguro de eliminar este pago?: Are you sure you want to remove this payment?
¿Estás seguro de eliminar este rol?: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
¿Estás seguro de eliminar la receta de: Are you sure you want to delete the recipe of
¿Estás seguro de eliminar la receta de e: Are you sure you want to delete the recipe for this item? All associated ingredients will be removed.
¿Estás seguro de que querés eliminar tu: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
¿Estás seguro de quitar el grupo: Are you sure you want to remove the group
¿Olvidaste tu contraseña? No hay problem: Forgot your password? No problem. Enter your email address and we will send you a password reset link.
¿Regenerar el token? Afecta también al l: Regenerate the token? It also affects the caller display: both screens will need to pair again.
¿Regenerar el token? Las direcciones act: Regenerate the token? Current addresses will stop working and already-paired devices will need to pair again.
¿Reiniciar la numeración? El próximo ped: Reset numbering? The next order will start from 1.
